name: Jason Moran
abstract: Jason Moran (born January 21, 1975) is an American jazz pianist, composer, and educator involved in multimedia art and theatrical installations. Moran recorded first with Greg Osby and debuted as a band leader with the 1999 album Soundtrack to Human Motion.

concerts.label: Two Wings: The Music of Black America in Migration
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

The Roar of the Greasepaint—The Smell of the Crowd: Feeling Good
There's a Man Goin' Round Takin' Names

works_created.t: Cane: Coincoin's Natchitoches to New York

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: Ivey Divey with Don Byron and Jason Moran... basically was just the three of us. Jason Moran, and me and Don... I love playing with Jason; he is so much fun to play with.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: David Weiss
about_quotes.evidence: I mean Jason Moran has kept his band together for a long time and it’s admirable and it certainly paid off, those guys are great.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Weiss interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2022

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: I like Jason Moran, and I like – the bass player’s son... I don’t know enough about them to talk about them.
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: Stefon Harris, Jason Moran, named the Kennedy Center adviser, and Hiromi.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
